message:
🐛 Fix hadolint files regex to match bare Dockerfile

The regex `Dockerfile.*` doesn't match a bare `Dockerfile` (no
extension). Changed to `Dockerfile(\\..*)?$` which matches both
`Dockerfile` and `Dockerfile.something`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -38,7 +38,7 @@ repos:
         language: system
         entry: hadolint
         args: [--failure-threshold, error]
-        files: Dockerfile.*
+        files: Dockerfile(\\..*)?$
         types: [file]
 
   # Markdown linting
